amendment.atlas_behavior_after: If any rollout for a prompt has no common sampled readout position, omit that entire prompt from the descriptive atlas, record both missing-rollout and skipped-mixed-prompt counts, and leave the frozen emotional-candidate analysis unchanged.
amendment.atlas_behavior_before: A rollout with no common sampled readout position raised ValueError and aborted its discovery shard.
amendment.reason: Attempt 1 failed during discovery because an optional descriptive-atlas edge case incorrectly aborted the primary frozen-candidate scan. No selected word/sign existed and validation had not opened.

outcome_status_at_freeze: attempt 1 failed before selection; partial discovery outputs were not inspected; corrected attempt not launched
